trace.gmd_app_delivery_path: infrastructure/gitops/gmd/applicationset.yaml -> Argo CD chart at infrastructure/gitops/gmd/chart/ pointing at upstream googlecloudplatform/microservices-demo images

workstream_a_gmd_build_intent_truth.decision: Current behavior is intended platform-build behavior. There is no missing downstream gmd-app build contract waiting to be wired. The misleading bit is the action label 'Build images' which read as 'build the gmd app' from the gmd context.
intentionally_not_done: invent a new downstream gmd-app build framework
wire any nonexistent gmd-app build script

previous_state_at_tranche_start.agent_image: fails on python:3.11-slim Docker Hub DNS
previous_state_at_tranche_start.dashboard_image: fails on node:20-alpine Docker Hub DNS

fixes_landed_in_tranche: Mirror python:3.11-slim and node:20-alpine to local registry under mirror/dockerhub/library/
Agent Dockerfile thin-rewrite for local builder (FROM amof-controlplane-deps; drop dead `pip install kubernetes`)
Dashboard Dockerfile thin-rewrite for local builder (FROM prebuilt amof-dashboard-deps; runner stage from mirrored node:20-alpine)
Prebuilt amof-dashboard-deps:local-node20-lock-26cc673a5e6c image built and pushed to local mirror
Assistant build made strictly opt-in even when Dockerfile present (matches existing comment; protects local happy path)
Cluster-build wrapper set -e bug fixed so successful builds no longer report failure

lifecycle_build_progression.after_UP8_8: fails on agent image (FROM mirror succeeds, pip install fails)
lifecycle_build_progression.after_UP8_9: fails on dashboard image (npm ci fails)
lifecycle_build_progression.after_UP8_10_local_assistant_appears: fails on assistant image (npm ci fails)
lifecycle_build_progression.after_UP8_11: all 3 platform images built, assistant skipped, but wrapper exits 1 due to set -e bug

commits_landed_to_canonical_main.summary: rewrite agent and dashboard Dockerhub bases for local builder; clarify build action truth
rewrite agent Dockerfile to thin form on local builder
rewrite dashboard Dockerfile to thin form on local builder
make amof-assistant build strictly opt-in even when Dockerfile present
prevent cluster-build wrapper from exiting on still-running poll (set -e bug)

successful_lifecycle_build_proof.note_on_runtime_image_alignment: Wrapper fix landed in canonical main as 2afb980 but the live in-cluster controlplane image is still pre-fix. The successful end-to-end run was achieved by hot-patching /app/scripts/run-cluster-build.sh in the running pod with the new file. Future controlplane image builds will bake in the fix; the deploy-time alignment is out of scope for this build-truth tranche.

truth_projection.gmd_build_intent_truth: release/lifecycle/build for the gmd ecosystem builds the AMOF platform images (controlplane + agent + dashboard, optional assistant). It does not build any gmd-app image. The action label and capabilities now state this explicitly via build_target_truth.
truth_projection.platform_builder_readiness: READY. The local k3d cluster builder can build amof-controlplane, amof-agent, and amof-dashboard end-to-end without any Docker Hub, PyPI, or npm registry access at build time. The previously reported lifecycle_build_failed surface for successful builds was caused by a wrapper set -e bug that is now fixed in canonical main and proven in a live run via hot-patch.
truth_projection.downstream_gmd_app_build_availability: NOT SUPPORTED. No gmd-app build script, Dockerfile-on-AMOF-side, or contract exists. The gmd ecosystem deploys upstream-provided googlecloudplatform/microservices-demo images via Argo CD ApplicationSet. Adding a gmd-app build path would be a new subsystem and is outside this lane.

next_blocker: Operational deploy: roll the new amof-controlplane image (which contains the wrapper set -e fix) into the live cluster so future builds report truthfully without hot-patch. This is operational deploy work, not source-truth work.
